title: [spec-compliance] EDHOC OSCORE exporter labels and derivation in 06-security.md differ from code
description: spec/06-security.md:349 uses EDHOC-Exporter("OSCORE Master Secret", h'' , 16) and similar for salt. However, rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:321 (updated in ed7ed668b) and python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py:464 use the standard EDHOC KDF labels 7 (PRK_out), 10 (PRK_exporter), 0 (master secret), 1 (master salt) per RFC 9528 §4.2 and test vectors. This is a MUST violation for interop. Code was aligned to Python reference but spec was not updated. See export_context() and _edhoc_kdf calls. Test vectors in test/vectors/ should be checked for consistency.
